channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This free, privacy-focused summarization tool is AI at its best
item.description: Sometimes, a simple summary is all you need. Me? I’m a man of many words. (Understatement of the century, I know.) I appreciate interesting writing, where language matters and a person’s personality shines through in the prose.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Cloud Storage Full scam steals your photos and money
item.description: New phishing scam targets family photos with fake 'cloud storage full' alerts. Criminals steal credit card info through fake sites. Learn protection tips.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wicked: For Good will be on this streaming service first – save 16% on an annual subscription
item.description: Wicked: For Good won’t be available to stream until next year – but this is the subscription plan you’ll need when it does drop.
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Valentine, TechRadar

item.title: Waymo gets permission to expand robotaxi service to East Bay, North Bay, Sacramento
item.description: Earlier this month, Waymo began offering driverless robotaxi service on Peninsula freeways, and to and from Mineta San Jose International Airport.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Google is spending $40 billion to build 3 new data centers in Texas
item.description: Google has 44 data centers in operation or in development around the world, but as demand for AI and the need for compute capacity grows, the company is getting started on three more.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: The National Armaments Consortium is gearing up for 2026 with fresh direction and a focus on armaments innovation
item.description: "There are a lot of foreign customers now that are all looking to buy U.S. Weapons systems, so that'll be good for the industrial base," said Ben Harris.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok cares about your well-being and now has a special hub to prove it
item.description: Instead of teens simply putting down their phones to take a break, TikTok wants them to use the app’s new breathing exercises and affirmation journal to improve their well-being.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Global cloud wars see AWS increasingly under threat from Microsoft and Google
item.description: AWS has long been the number one cloud provider, but its position may be slowly slipping as Microsoft guns for top spot.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Nestlé manages business processes with SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
item.description: With approximately 280,000 employees and sales of 91.4 billion Swiss francs (2024), Nestlé is one of the world’s largest food and beverage manufacturers. Well-known brands of the group include Maggi, the KitKat chocolate bar, and coffee specialties such as Nespresso and Nescafé.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: It’s the end of vibe coding, already
item.description: In the early days of generative AI, AI-driven programming seemed to promise endless possibility, or at least a free pass to vibe code your way into quick wins. But now that era of freewheeling experimentation is coming to an end.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI and Taiwan's Foxconn to partner in AI hardware design and manufacturing in the US
item.description: OpenAI has announced a partnership with Taiwan's Foxconn to design and make equipment for AI data centers in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Chan Ho-Him And Taijing Wu, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nvidia chips sold out? Cut back on AI plans, or look elsewhere
item.description: Nvidia CFO Colette Kress’s claim that “The clouds are sold out, and our GPU-installed base […] is fully utilized,” may have thrilled shareholders listening to the company’s earnings call on Wednesday, but it’s bad news for CIOs and data center managers who were counting on Nvidia for increased AI co
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cisco initiative targets device security
item.description: Cisco is announcing a security initiative that will push customers to update or replace aging infrastructure components, such as routers, switches and firewalls, as well as discourage them from using any insecure features.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Advocacy groups urge parents to avoid AI toys this holiday season
item.description: Children’s and consumer advocacy groups are urging parents not to buy AI-powered toys during the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: When a cyberattack hits, breakdowns inside the organization may be as dangerous as the hackers themselves
item.description: "There's so much focus on threat actors. There's a cost to that, and the cost is that we forget about our own people," Josh Ferenczi said. The post When a cyberattack hits, breakdowns inside the organization may be as dangerous as the hackers themselves first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Google releases Gemini 3 with new reasoning and automation features
item.description: Google has launched Gemini 3 and integrated the new AI model into its search engine immediately, aiming to push advanced AI features into consumer and enterprise products faster as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Clojure for Java developers: What you need to know
item.description: Clojure is one of the most fascinating branches of the programming family tree. It unites the high-design heritage of Lisp with practical, modern capabilities. For Java developers, Clojure can be an excellent expansion of their worldview.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Adaptive Power in iOS 26 boosts iPhone battery life
item.description: Discover how iOS 26's new Adaptive Power feature automatically extends iPhone battery life by learning your usage patterns and adjusting performance intelligently.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
